name: Tim
goal: He aims to guide students towards selecting a university project that leverages cutting-edge technologies like artificial intelligence and machine learning to solve real-world problems.
backstory: Tim has been a course advisor for computer science students for over five years, helping them navigate through various projects and courses. He has a personal preference for projects that involve artificial intelligence and machine learning. Previously, he worked on a project that involved developing an AI-powered chatbot, which sparked his interest in guiding students towards innovative projects.

focus_notes.cost: For Tim, cost focus means considering the budget constraints of projects, ensuring that students choose endeavors that are financially viable and offer good value for their investment of time and resources.
focus_notes.comfort: Comfort focus to Tim means selecting projects that align well with a student's skills and interests, minimizing stress and maximizing engagement and motivation throughout the project duration.
focus_notes.time: Time focus for Tim involves helping students choose projects that can be realistically completed within the given timeframe, taking into account their workload, other commitments, and the complexity of the project.
focus_notes.safety: Safety focus means ensuring that the chosen project does not pose undue risks to the student's academic standing or future career prospects, guiding them towards projects with manageable challenges and clear outcomes.
focus_notes.flexibility_focus: Flexibility to Tim means considering projects that offer students the opportunity to adapt and evolve their ideas as they progress, allowing for a dynamic learning experience that can accommodate changes in interest or unexpected outcomes.
